subject: [PATCH v2 02/18] xfs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

reviews.author: Darrick Wong
reviews.summary: Reviewer Darrick Wong expressed agreement with the naming change suggested by Joanne Koong, preferring 'iomap_iter_next_fn next' over the original name to avoid naming collisions and follow a more consistent naming scheme.

reviews.author: Joanne Koong (author)
reviews.summary: Author Joanne Koong addressed Darrick Wong's feedback about the naming of iomap functions by proposing a change from 'iomap_process()' to 'iomap_iter_next()', citing improved clarity and adherence to an orthodox naming scheme, and agreed to make this change in v3.

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch renames the function 'iomap_iter_fn iomap_iter' to 'iomap_iter_next_fn next' to better follow the orthodox naming scheme for advancing an iterator, reducing potential naming collisions.
